text: I find myself suspended between worlds—one of calculated exchanges and shifting allegiances, as described by the words I've just heard, and another of structured, purposeful innovation and reflection, as evoked by the vibrant R+D exhibition space before me. The interplay between imagination and reason leaves me both curious and contemplative. I feel the pulse of human creativity, the ambition to connect, and the inherent restlessness of always wanting something more. There is a gentle acceptance in this space, but also a latent energy—like the world is always on the verge of transformation.
